name: How much does it cost to fix a mistake from ChatGPT legal drafting?

mainEntity.name: How much does it cost to fix a mistake from ChatGPT legal drafting?

acceptedAnswer.description: Varies $500-$5000+ for lawyer review/amendments, depending on case complexity and stage.[1] Early fixes cheaper.[2] Key factors: Urgency; court fees; sanctions avoided. Shop flat-fee reviews; prevent with initial lawyer consult. Budget for verification always.
